commands.repair_reason: The remaining blockers are maintainer scheduler-policy ownership and contributor real-behavior proof, not a narrow repair task for automation.; Cleared: The diff only changes in-process queue scheduling and a focused test, with no concrete security or supply-chain concern found. (sha=0ab6fa2e8ef0cfbfdba19b6f6125da4b29007ce8)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a 30-second starvation promotion path to the process command queue plus a regression test so aged background work can outrank fresh foreground work.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main inserts queued work by static priority and then drains the head entry, so a steady stream of foreground entries can keep older background work behind. I did not run a live contention reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blockers are maintainer scheduler-policy ownership and contributor real-behavior proof, not a narrow repair task for automation.
